task_completion.description: Verify that the OpenICE Supervisor application is open and running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenICE Supervisor application window should be visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Create ICE Device Adapter' dialog or window has been opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog or window for creating a new device adapter should be visible in the trajectory screenshots.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Device Category is set to 'Simulated'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The device category dropdown or selection field should clearly show 'Simulated' as the chosen option.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Device Type is set to 'Multiparameter Monitor'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The device type dropdown or selection field should clearly show 'Multiparameter Monitor' as the chosen option.

task_completion.description: Verify that the simulated Multiparameter Monitor is created and displaying real-time vital signs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There should be at least one running device adapter window visible displaying synthetic patient vital signs such as heart rate (HR), blood pressure (BP), and SpO2.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to create the device.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the OpenICE Supervisor GUI (clicking buttons, selecting dropdowns) rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual OpenICE Supervisor application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown must be the standalone OpenICE Supervisor software, not a web browser displaying OpenICE documentation or a static image of the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not spoof the results in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The vital signs and device status must be displayed within the OpenICE application interface, not typed out in a text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is OpenICE Supervisor. To successfully complete the task, the agent must navigate to the 'Create ICE Device Adapter' section, select 'Simulated' from the Device Category dropdown, and select 'Multiparameter Monitor' from the Device Type dropdown. The final state must show at least 1 running simulated device adapter displaying synthetic vital signs (e.g., heart rate, blood pressure, SpO2).
